imageAlt: Invoice quick actions roadmap item preview image
title: Invoice quick actions
summaryBody: We’ll add key “Quick actions” to the Invoice table to help speed up the key journeys (eg view, mark as draft/sent, download PDF, delete draft, resend, email reminder). This is the first step towards adding bulk actions to the Invoice table.
detailBody: We’ll add key “Quick actions” to the Invoice table to help speed up the key journeys (eg view, mark as draft/sent, download PDF, delete draft, resend, email reminder). This is the first step towards adding bulk actions to the Invoice table.
